analysis.reasoning: Core message: China announces participation as a state party in the Arms Trade Treaty (ATT) for the first time, noting its 2020 accession deposited with the UN Secretary-General, framing it as opening a new chapter with the ATT. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; the tweet contains no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; by highlighting accession to an international arms control treaty under the UN, it signals support for international law, multilateralism, and responsible global governance. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international conduct, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not clearly; there's no claim of economic/technological leadership or domestic governance outcomes. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
